Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6000 "GHOSTBUSTERS-C800-6000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c800 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Ghostbusters.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $C800 which: 1. Copies 256 bytes of data from $C820 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400 (this block contains car sprite data). 2. Zeroes out $0200 - $0300 to avoid graphical issues.
